phase_1_git_repository_state.untracked_files_note: AP_SYSTEM_AUDIT session artifacts only — covered by .gitignore

lfs.note: LFS configured but no .gitattributes — no tracked LFS objects yet

notes: All 4 CI workflows declared and syntactically present
No .gitattributes despite LFS configuration — benign if no binary blobs are tracked

extensions_json.note: ms-python.autopep8 installed in container but not declared in devcontainer.json or extensions.json — undeclared extension

ruff.drift_note: ruff binary is at user-local path /home/vscode/.local/bin/ruff, not /usr/local/bin/. May not be available to all users/shells.

pycache_files_tracked_in_git.drift_note: __pycache__ directories and .pyc files are tracked in git. .gitignore rule for __pycache__/ is present but these files were committed before the .gitignore was created. They should be removed from git tracking with 'git rm -r --cached **/__pycache__/'.

staging_artifacts.note: Directory present but not listed in .gitignore — review if contents should be excluded

drift_findings.description: ruff binary at user-local path /home/vscode/.local/bin/ruff instead of system path /usr/local/bin/
drift_findings.impact: May not be available in non-interactive shells or to other users. CI workflows invoking ruff directly may resolve a different version.
drift_findings.remediation: Install ruff system-wide: 'pip install ruff' as part of postCreateCommand, or pin in requirements.txt and verify path.

drift_findings.description: __pycache__ directories and .pyc compiled files are tracked in git
drift_findings.impact: Bloats repository, causes spurious diffs across Python versions, undermines deterministic builds.
drift_findings.remediation: Run: git rm -r --cached '**/__pycache__' && git commit -m 'chore: remove tracked pycache files'

drift_findings.description: ms-python.autopep8 is installed in the container but is not declared in devcontainer.json customizations or .vscode/extensions.json
drift_findings.impact: Non-reproducible across fresh rebuilds. Undeclared tooling creates environment inconsistency.
drift_findings.remediation: Either add ms-python.autopep8 to devcontainer.json extensions list, or uninstall it if autopep8 formatting is not desired (black is declared and sufficient).

drift_findings.description: python.formatting.provider: 'black' in devcontainer.json is a deprecated setting
drift_findings.impact: Deprecated but harmless on current VS Code. May produce warnings in future releases.
drift_findings.remediation: Remove from devcontainer.json; black formatting is governed by pyproject.toml and editor.formatOnSave.

drift_findings.description: tests/ directory is missing from the repository
drift_findings.impact: pytest task (AP: Run Tests) and test.yml CI workflow target 'tests/' — both will fail to discover tests. .vscode/settings.json pytestArgs points to 'tests/'.
drift_findings.remediation: Create tests/ directory with at minimum a placeholder (tests/__init__.py or tests/test_placeholder.py) and commit.

drift_findings.description: terminal.integrated.accessibleViewFocusOnCommandExecution redirects terminal output to Accessible View in VS Code
drift_findings.impact: Terminal output appears in Accessible View instead of inline. Cosmetic/UX issue only.
drift_findings.remediation: Set terminal.integrated.accessibleViewFocusOnCommandExecution=false in client-side VS Code user settings (not container-settable).

freeze_blockers: DRIFT-005: tests/ directory missing — CI and pytest tasks will fail
passing_checks: Branch is in sync with origin/main
Python interpreter path aligned between devcontainer.json and settings.json
pyproject.toml created with deterministic black/ruff/mypy config
All 4 CI workflows have required dependency files present
All authoritative AP design documents present
No detached HEAD, merge, rebase, or stash state
venv/ removed and excluded from tracking

recommended_next_actions: 1. Remove tracked __pycache__ files: git rm -r --cached '**/__pycache__' && git commit
2. Create tests/ directory with placeholder: mkdir tests && touch tests/__init__.py && git add && git commit
3. Resolve ruff path drift: add ruff to requirements.txt pip install or move to system path
4. Optionally clean up ms-python.autopep8 extension declaration
6. (Client-side) Set terminal.integrated.accessibleViewFocusOnCommandExecution=false in VS Code user settings
